A brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] New effect
- [ ] New theme
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] New effects include a cleanup function
- [ ] New effects respect `ctx.intensity`
- [ ] Docs updated (if public API changed)
- [ ] Added to `src/effects/index.ts` (if new effect)
